# Shiny Octopus

> Digital creative studio specialized in SEO audits, accessibility audits, and web development that drives business growth.

Shiny Octopus helps businesses improve their online presence through data-driven audits and strategic web development. We focus on measurable outcomes: more qualified traffic, better conversion rates, and stronger brand trust.

## Services

- [SEO Audit](https://shinyoctopus.studio/seo): Business-first SEO audits that review website structure, messaging, and visibility blockers. Plans from USD 490 to USD 2,590.
- [Accessibility Audit](https://shinyoctopus.studio/accesibilidad): WCAG-based accessibility audits that identify usability barriers and conversion friction. Plans from USD 590 to USD 2,990.
- [Platform Strategy](https://shinyoctopus.studio/servers): Infrastructure and platform recommendations based on business goals, team workflow, and growth plans.

## Blog

- [Insights and guides](https://shinyoctopus.studio/blog): Practical articles on SEO, accessibility, web performance, and digital strategy.

## Contact

- [Get in touch](https://shinyoctopus.studio/contact): Book an audit or consultation. Response within 24 hours.
- Email: hi@shinyoctopus.studio
